title: Demo Control Center Accessible Under Admin Navigation
description: The Demo Control Center shall be accessible from the Admin section of the primary navigation. It shall be visible only to the SYSTEM_ADMIN persona. The control center provides all demo management actions in one workspace to avoid manual data manipulation during presentations.

title: Reset Demo Action Restores All Seed Data to Known Good State
description: The [Reset Demo] action (UI button + POST /api/demo/reset endpoint) shall restore all JSON seed files to their original state, clear any in-progress enrollments, reset AI extraction cache, and return the application to the pre-demo ready state. Reset shall complete within 3 seconds.

title: Demo Scenario Presets: Happy Path / Exceptions / Failures
description: The Demo Control Center shall offer three pre-configured scenario presets. Each preset configures the carrier simulation mode, AI extraction state, and seed data configuration for a specific demo narrative.

scenarios.label: Happy Path
scenarios.description: All carrier transmissions succeed; AI extracts with high confidence; Linda White enrollment processes cleanly

scenarios.label: Exception Handling
scenarios.description: CT-10045 carrier rejection active; DEP-022 age-out approaching; eligibility conflict BR-001/BR-002 visible; LE-001 marriage pending docs

scenarios.label: Failure & Recovery
scenarios.description: All carrier transmissions fail; AI rate-limit fallback active; payroll mismatch DED-10001 visible

title: Carrier Simulation Controls — Accept All / Partial Failure / Reject All
description: The Demo Control Center shall provide one-click buttons to switch the carrier simulation mode during a live demo without requiring a full reset. Mode changes take effect on the next transmission or polling refresh.

title: AI Mode Controls — Live Gemini / Demo Fallback Data
description: The Demo Control Center shall allow switching between Live AI (real Gemini calls) and Demo Fallback (pre-cached extraction results). Fallback mode displays a clearly labeled banner in the AI Requirements section: 'Demo Fallback Data — Pre-cached results shown'.

modes.label: [🤖 Live AI]
modes.description: Real Gemini API calls; requires API key

fallbackBanner: Demo Fallback Data — Pre-cached results shown

title: Simulate Specific Errors On Demand
description: The Demo Control Center shall provide buttons to activate specific pre-seeded error scenarios: Carrier Rejection (CT-10045), Payroll Mismatch (DED-10001), AI Rate Limit simulation, and Dependent SSN Invalid (CT-10045 DEP-INVALID-ID).

simulatableErrors.label: [AI Rate Limit]
simulatableErrors.action: Return RATE_LIMITED on next AI call

simulatableErrors.label: [Dependent SSN Invalid]
simulatableErrors.action: Set DEP-022 SSN validation to INVALID

title: Demo Time Controls — Advance to Specific Date for Date-Sensitive Scenarios
description: The Demo Control Center shall provide a demo date override. When set, date-sensitive calculations (waiting period completions, age-out dates, enrollment window expiry) evaluate against the demo date rather than the system clock. Supports demonstrating DEP-022 age-out (2027-04-01) or enrollment deadline expiry.

demoDateScenarios.label: Age-Out Day
demoDateScenarios.reveals: DEP-022 Sarah Smith coverage about to terminate

title: Quick Persona Switch Accessible from Demo Control Center
description: The Demo Control Center shall include a persona quick-switch panel showing all 8 demo personas. Clicking a persona immediately switches the active session to that persona without navigating away from the control center.

title: Pre-Warm AI Extraction Cache Before Live Demo
description: The Demo Control Center shall include a [Pre-Warm AI] action that submits all 5 Acme documents for AI extraction and caches the results. This ensures the AI extraction 'wow moment' is fast during the live demo even with Gemini latency. Pre-warm status shows: Not Cached / Warming / Cached / Expired.

title: Demo Snapshot Save and Restore for In-Session Recovery
description: The Demo Control Center shall allow saving the current data state as a named snapshot and restoring from a saved snapshot. This is critical for mid-demo recovery if a presenter accidentally modifies data. Max 3 saved snapshots.
snapshotScope: All JSON seed files in the seed/ directory

title: npm run reset-demo CLI Command Equivalent to UI Reset
description: The npm run reset-demo script shall perform the same data reset as the UI Reset Demo action. This allows pre-demo setup without opening the application. Script shall output a confirmation list of reset steps and complete in ≤ 5 seconds.
outputExample: ✓ Seed data restored | ✓ Enrollment drafts cleared | ✓ AI cache cleared | ✓ Demo ready

title: Demo Environment Indicator Always Visible in Application Shell
description: The application shell shall display a persistent demo environment indicator (e.g., a colored banner or badge labeled 'DEMO') that is always visible. This prevents confusion during customer presentations and makes it clear this is a demonstration environment.
indicatorLocations: Page title prefix in browser tab
